image_to_world_mapping: Use the image as art direction and the JSON coordinates as gameplay source of truth. Do not pixel-sample the painted image directly.
why: The image is painterly and not tile-discrete. Work backwards by using the composition, then author tile maps and terrain masks to match it.
pipeline: Use regions.json for region placement and progression.
Use landmarks.json for hand-built points of interest.
Create local 64x64 to 160x160 tile maps for each detailed area.
Stitch local maps into the 1000x1000 world.
